dialog_history.content: Hello, how can I help you?
I have been experiencing a productive cough with yellow-green sputum and significant dyspnea for the past four days. I also have a fever of 38.7°C, chills, and right-sided pleuritic chest pain.
My current condition has resulted in fatigue and a marked decrease in appetite. I am currently experiencing a pain level of 5 in my right chest.
I have no history of hemoptysis, orthopnea, or lower extremity edema. My daily medications include lisinopril, metformin, and atorvastatin.
[DDX] (Community-acquired pneumonia; Pulmonary embolism; Acute bronchitis; Congestive heart failure; Pleurisy)
